---
title: "cortex_link.test.ts"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/tests/node/cortex_link.test.ts"
loc: 110
complexity: 10
logic_score: 2.57
style_score: 4.08
intel_score: 2.85
overall_score: 3.38
---

## Intent
A functional component of the Corvus Star static analysis matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Import and utilize via the standard project structure.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.6/10
- **Style [S]**: 4.1/10
- **Intel [I]**: 2.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 15 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [test](file://node:test)
- [describe](file://node:test)
- [it](file://node:test)
- [assert](file://node:assert)
- [EventEmitter](file://node:events)
- [CortexLink](file://../../src/node/cortex_link.js)

### Exports
- `mockWsOptions`
- `MockWebSocket`
- `payload`
- `link`
- `res`
- `link`
- `link`
- `link`
